name: Cheesy Chili Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together 2 and a half cups cheese and flour.
2. Saute onion in butter until softened.
3. Remove from heat; stir in the cheese mixture.
4. Brown meat and drain excess fat.
5. Add tomato sauce, beans, and seasonings to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Dip each tortilla in cooking oil to soften them slightly.
7. Place about a quarter cup of cheese mixture on each tortilla.
8. Roll up the tortillas tightly and place seam side down in an 11-3/4 by 7-1/2-inch baking dish.
9. Cover with meat mixture.
10. Cover the dish with aluminum foil.
11. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until heated through.
12. Top with remaining cheese before serving.
